name: Cranberry Ginger Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, pour the boiling water over the ginger and cranberries.
2. Cover the bowl and let stand for 20 minutes.
3. Strain the mixture into another bowl or pitcher.
4. Add the nutmeg and cranberry juice to the strained liquid.
5. Stir until well combined.
6. Serve warm or chilled over ice cubes, garnished with mint sprigs.
SERVES: 2
PREPARATION TIME: 25 minutes
